Impact: !!15 hours saved per week. Significant reduction in processing time and improved accuracy across all departments.

Challenge: Staff onboarding takes too long and information is scattered across multiple systems.
Solution: Create a centralized digital hub for all staff resources with guided onboarding pathways and interactive training modules.
Impact: !!75% reduction in onboarding time. New staff report 90% satisfaction with improved onboarding experience.
Development Notes: Project completed successfully. Positive feedback from all user groups. Now being rolled out university-wide.

Challenge: Data scattered across multiple systems makes reporting difficult and time-consuming.
Solution: Build an integrated analytics platform that aggregates data from various sources into a unified dashboard with real-time reporting capabilities.
Impact: Colleagues will have access to real-time data insights with reporting time reduced significantly.
Development Notes: Beta testing with pilot group. Performance optimization underway. Full deployment planned for next quarter.

Challenge: Students struggle to find the right support services when they need help.
Solution: Develop a smart routing system that directs students to appropriate support based on their specific needs.
Impact: Students will receive faster, more targeted support with improved student satisfaction scores expected.
Development Notes: AI model training in progress. Integration with existing systems being tested.

Solution: Create a comprehensive knowledge base with AI-powered search and collaborative editing capabilities.
Impact: !!120 documents centralized in searchable repository. Knowledge retention improved across teams.
Development Notes: Content migration 60% complete. Training sessions scheduled for next month.
